directive_events.owner_directive: Rename Update Manager to Package Manager; it must include add/install, update, and delete operations. In the top toolbar, remove the ws/log status indicator and replace it with a 'packages' button + package icon; clicking opens a standalone Package Manager window supporting install, delete, update.
directive_events.reason: Owner expanded UI scope: full Package Manager (install/update/delete) in a separate window, opened from a toolbar packages button that replaces the ws/log status indicator

findings.message: protected core/runtime change requires admin-approved:core-change applied by an authorized maintainer or administrator approval
Sentrux evidence is recommended for source/workflow/architecture changes (advisory, opt-in).

owner_directive: Extend desktop OTA to per-package hot-update driven by an in-app Update Manager UI. Packages self-declare OTA source via PackageInfo.ota; Python backend downloads/verifies/stages per-package patches; desktop recognizes patch dir and relaunches; semver-based, public repos, min_core_base gate. Owner approved admin-approved:core-change for PackageInfo.

scope_events.reason: PackageInfo.ota touches protected core path src/scistudio/blocks/**; owner approved core-change
Owner expanded UI scope: full Package Manager (install/update/delete) in a separate window, opened from a toolbar packages button that replaces the ws/log status indicator
